title: PR Professional Converge at NIPR Lagos State Chapter September Meeting - FinancialEDGE

html:
Public relations professionals gather at the Nigeria Institute of Public Relations (NIPR) Lagos State Chapter September meeting and PR Clinic.

Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director of Financial Edge, and Ikediashi Francisca, Corporate Communication Manager at Ajinomoto Foods Nigeria Limited, were at the meeting.

The meeting provided a platform for public relations professionals to share insights, best practices, and industry trends.

As a seasoned media professional, Odume Festus’ attendance underscores the importance of the event in fostering professional growth and networking within the PR community.

While as Corporate Communication Manager at Ajinomoto Foods Nigeria Limited, Ikediashi Francisca’s participation highlights the significance of effective communication in the corporate world.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Odume Festus, Editorial  / Project Director Financial Edge  and Ikediashi Francisca , Corporate Communication Manager Ajinomoto Foods Nigeria Limited at Nigeria Institute of Public Relations (NIPR) Lagos State Chapter September meeting and PR Clinic.
